summary: Alley Boss engages in a public confrontation with the Mano Guild after they attempt to antagonize him, streaming the battle to his thousands of followers. Despite the Mano Guild launching a full-scale assault against him at the Khunta Plateau, Alley Boss uses his pet, Tangy, and superior combat skills to dismantle their forces. The conflict escalates as Alley Boss vows to persistently hunt the guild members, effectively threatening to ruin their ability to play the game.
key_moments: Alley Boss streams a preemptive victory against the Mano Guild to his audience.
The Mano Guild launches a full-scale counter-attack at the Khunta Plateau.
Alley Boss utilizes his pet, Tangy, to disrupt the guild's mages and win the battle.
